mapper.sql: id, name, description, icon, status, creator_id, creator_name, create_time, update_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE wiki_space
name = #{name},
description = #{description},
icon = #{icon},
status = #{status},
update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM wiki_space WHERE status = 'A' ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT FROM wiki_space
status = 'A'
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_space_recent (user_id, space_id, last_visit) VALUES (#{userId}, #{spaceId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wiki_space_recent WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND space_id = #{spaceId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.description, s.icon, s.status, s.creator_id, s.creator_name, s.create_time, s.update_time FROM wiki_space s INNER JOIN wiki_space_recent r ON s.id = r.space_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 'A' ORDER BY r.last_visit DESC
